name: restaurantos
description: A full-featured bilingual (AR/EN) restaurant & café management system

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix server && npm run test --prefix client
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test --prefix server && npm run test --prefix client -- --coverage
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix server ; npm run lint --prefix client
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint --prefix server -- --fix ; npm run lint --prefix client -- --fix
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix server && npm run typecheck --prefix client
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run install --prefix server && npx prisma generate --prefix server && npx prisma db push --prefix server && npx tsx prisma/seed.ts --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
